title: Tom’s Pride
description: Tom’s work, the judicial pressure against him, and the Sea Train project connect Water Seven’s past to the present crisis.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, this part follows Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam, Kokoro. Tom’s work, the judicial pressure against him, and the Sea Train project connect Water Seven’s past to the present crisis.
